arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou keen to see Son shine at Spurs for as long as possible
arts.sum: The South Korean has played every minute for Tottenham in the Premier League this season.

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag says Man United must ‘respect the criticism’ ahead of Spurs clash
arts.sum: Ten Hag was annoyed by United’s mentality and toothlessness in their Europa League opener against FC Twente.

arts.ttl: Sam Allardyce risks Erik ten Hag's wrath with "behind the scenes" Man Utd theory
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford was surprisingly left on the bench for Manchester United’s Premier League clash with Crystal Palace and a number of comments have been made about his place under Erik ten Hag

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou insists he wants to 'ease' Son Heung-min's workload after playing him more than he wanted to this season... with the Tottenham star a DOUBT for their clash with Man United
arts.sum: MATT BARLOW: Son has been ever present this season, starting in all except the Carabao Cup tie at Coventry when he came on for the last half hour with the result in the balance.

arts.ttl: Ornstein reveals Man Utd's transfer plans for 2025
arts.sum: Manchester United are determined to add to their offensive ranks in upcoming transfer windows, according to David Ornstein. However, after signing Manuel Ugarte late in the window, Man Utd were not in a position to bolster their attack.

arts.ttl: Ole Gunnar Solskjaer reveals the real reason Man Utd re-signed Cristiano Ronaldo
arts.sum: Cristiano Ronaldo made a dream return to Manchester United in the summer of 2021 from Juventus but the Portuguese only spent 18 months at Old Trafford before an explosive exit

arts.ttl: Micky van de Ven makes Tottenham feelings clear after ruthless Postecoglou call before Man United
arts.sum: Micky van de Ven has responded to a surprising and brutal Tottenham decision made by Ange Postecoglou. Former Spurs man Pierre-Emile Hojbjerg, Dominic Solanke, Richarlison and Micky van de Ven were all in the replies to congratulate Vicario.

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford given brutal football 'priority' verdict but Man United solution is simple
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford has been slammed by former England coach Jimmy Floyd Hasselbaink, who has questioned the Manchester United star's commitment and desire to get back to his best

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou names three Spurs players who could now fill in for Son Heung-min including 'fantastic' teenager
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are currently sweating on the fitness of Son Heung-min, who picked up a knock on Thursday night. Spurs hosted Qarabag in their Europa...

arts.ttl: REVEALED: The year Man Utd 'aim to win' 14th Premier League title
arts.sum: The Athletic report that one extra year has been added to that target, with Berrada stressing a desire to mark the club's 150th anniversary with a first Premier League title win since 2012/13 under Sir Alex Ferguson. The aptly named 'Project 150' sets out a long-term plan to make United competitive over the next few years and put them into a position of sufficient strength to win the title 150 years after the club was founded in 1878.
